ddls:
CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "image_name" TEXT /* Name of the image */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of the image (e.g., JPEG, PNG, etc.) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  "image_size" INTEGER /* Size of the image in bytes */,
  "image_resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the image (e.g., 1920x1080) */,
  "image_description" TEXT /* Optional description of the image */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the image */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the image has been deleted */,
  "deleted_date" TEXT /* Date when the image was deleted (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shapes" (
  "shape_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shape */,
  "shape_name" TEXT /* Name of the shape */,
  "shape_type" TEXT /* Type of the shape (e.g., circle, rectangle, etc.) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the shape was uploaded */,
  "shape_description" TEXT /* Optional description of the shape */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the shape */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the shape has been deleted */,
  "deleted_date" TEXT /* Date when the shape was deleted (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shape_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image the metric belongs to */,
  "shape_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shape the metric belongs to */,
  "eccentricity" REAL /* Eccentricity of the shape */,
  "aspect_ratio" REAL /* Aspect ratio of the shape */,
  "elongation" REAL /* Elongation of the shape */,
  "solidity" REAL /* Solidity of the shape */,
  "stochastic_convexity" REAL /* Stochastic convexity of the shape */,
  "isoperimetric_factor" REAL /* Isoperimetric factor of the shape */,
  "maximal_indentation_depth" REAL /* Maximal indentation depth of the shape */,
  "lobedness" REAL /* Lobedness of the shape */,
  "average_intensity" REAL /* Average intensity of the image */,
  "average_contrast" REAL /* Average contrast of the image */,
  "smoothness" REAL /* Smoothness of the image */,
  "third_moment" REAL /* Third moment of the image */,
  "uniformity" REAL /* Uniformity of the image */,
  "entropy" REAL /* Entropy of the image */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Optional description of the metric */,
  "metric_version" TEXT /* Version of the metric calculation algorithm */,
  "calculated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who calculated the metrics */,
  "calculation_date" TEXT /* Date when the metrics were calculated */,
  "is_valid" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the metrics are valid (e.g., not corrupted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_shape_id FOREIGN KEY ("shape_id") REFERENCES shapes ("shape_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classifications" (
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each classification */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image the classification belongs to */,
  "shape_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shape the classification belongs to */,
  "classification" TEXT /* Classification of the image or shape (e.g., good, bad, etc.) */,
  "classification_description" TEXT /* Optional description of the classification */,
  "classified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who classified the image/shape */,
  "classification_date" TEXT /* Date when the classification was made */,
  "is_reviewed" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the classification has been reviewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classifications_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classifications_shape_id FOREIGN KEY ("shape_id") REFERENCES shapes ("shape_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "is_administrator" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the user has administrator privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON string containing permissions for the role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was created */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the role is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the image or shape */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image accessed */,
  "shape_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shape accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the image or shape was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from which the access was made */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the access was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_shape_id FOREIGN KEY ("shape_id") REFERENCES shapes ("shape_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_shape_metrics" (
  "image_shape_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image-shape metric */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image */,
  "shape_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shape */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_shape_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_shape_metrics_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_shape_metrics_shape_id FOREIGN KEY ("shape_id") REFERENCES shapes ("shape_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_shape_metrics_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_classifications" (
  "image_classification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image classification */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image */,
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* ID of the classification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_classification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_classifications_classification_id FOREIGN KEY ("classification_id") REFERENCES classifications ("classification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_classifications_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shape_classifications" (
  "shape_classification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shape classification */,
  "shape_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shape */,
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* ID of the classification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shape_classification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shape_classifications_classification_id FOREIGN KEY ("classification_id") REFERENCES classifications ("classification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shape_classifications_shape_id FOREIGN KEY ("shape_id") REFERENCES shapes ("shape_id")
)
